issues.description: Use of eval()
issues.recommendation: Avoid eval; parse JSON with JSON.parse, use safe alternatives.

issues.description: new Function() dynamic code generation
issues.recommendation: Avoid compiling strings to code; refactor to static functions.

issues.description: Use of eval()
issues.recommendation: Avoid eval; parse JSON with JSON.parse, use safe alternatives.

issues.description: new Function() dynamic code generation
issues.recommendation: Avoid compiling strings to code; refactor to static functions.

issues.description: Assignment to innerHTML (potential XSS if data is user-controlled)
issues.recommendation: Prefer textContent, or sanitize with a trusted library and encode output.

issues.recommendation: Use environment variables; exclude placeholders in examples only.

issues.description: Inline event handler attribute (e.g. onclick, onload)
issues.recommendation: Prefer addEventListener and keep logic in script files with a strict CSP.

issues.description: Form with user inputs may lack required/pattern client-side hints
issues.recommendation: Add server-side validation always; add required/pattern where appropriate (client is not sufficient).

issues.description: Inline style attributes detected (125 occurrence(s))
issues.recommendation: Prefer external CSS; inline styles complicate CSP style-src and maintenance.
